topology.summary: Two declared cells share one DU; one UE attach-plus-ping path is reviewed per cell.

blast_radius.max_change_scope: two named cell groups on one declared DU
blast_radius.operator_impact: A bad change may degrade both declared cells on the shared DU, but it must not widen past the named DU and cell pair.
blocked_until: precheck and verify can report each cell separately

approval.approval_scope: shared-du multi-cell cutover or verification trial
required_checks: the declared cell pair matches the profile
each cell has an explicit rollback path
reviewers can distinguish per-cell success and failure

restore_actions: restore the affected cell group to the single-lane reference state
confirm the sibling cell remains within the declared failure-domain rules
rollback_triggers: either declared cell loses verify readiness
shared-DU health becomes degraded or blocked

success_criteria: each declared cell has explicit gate-class history
the shared DU keeps rollback state visible for both cells

manual_review: confirm reviewer notes keep this lane separate from the single-lane runtime claim

non_claims: no broad topology parity claim outside the declared profile
